nhi_verdict.evidence_type: behavioral, statistical (n=3 per cell, 48 runs total)

schema_change_notes: v2 splits substrate vs NHI verdict per docs/governance.md §1 (Principle 1: two truth-claims, two evidence streams, never conflated).

v1 had a single `campaign.verdict` field that collapsed substrate + NHI evidence; v2 separates them into `substrate_verdict` (Phase 1, S1–S24, binary/reproducible) and `nhi_verdict` (Phase 3, behavioral, statistical).
Reader convention: use `substrate_verdict` for ship/no-ship gating; use `nhi_verdict` to assess utility delta of ai-memory under realistic agent workloads.

`version` + `verdict` at top level are flat shims for the existing release-summary-gate.yml workflow; they mirror `subject.tag` and a derived collapse of substrate+nhi (pass iff substrate ∈ {PASS, 'PARTIAL — pending Patch 2'} AND nhi=PASS, else fail/pending).

2026-05-04 (FULL 9/9 STREAK): all three frameworks satisfied the operator-directive standard of '3 consecutive runs at 100% pass' on local-docker mesh. OpenClaw r1/r2/r3 + IronClaw r1/r2/r3 + Hermes r1/r2/r3 all overall_pass=true with 35/35 scenarios per run. Earlier 2026-05-04 entries that limited the pass scope to OpenClaw only are superseded — the IronClaw + Hermes mesh harnesses landed (PR #55) and produced their own genuine 3-green streaks against the same substrate testbook v3.0.0 35-scenario set. The DO ironclaw/hermes PENDING entries in substrate_verdict.matrix track the v0.6.3.1-NEW S-prefixed scenarios (DO topology only) and remain Patch 2 candidates.

expected_red_rationale.S23: Issue #507 — ~/-prefixed config.toml `db` field does not expand to $HOME. Fix scheduled for v0.6.3.2.
expected_red_rationale.S24: Issue #318 — MCP stdio tool dispatch writes bypass federation fanout. Fix scheduled for v0.6.3.2.

headline: v0.6.3.1 — 9 / 9 substrate streaks GREEN: 3 OpenClaw + 3 IronClaw + 3 Hermes (local-docker, 35 / 35 scenarios per run, 0 failure reasons per run). Operator directive 2026-05-04 standard met.

cells.notes: 3 runs × 35/35 substrate scenarios. overall_pass=true on every run. Workstation 16 GB/container Docker mesh, xAI Grok 4.3, ai-memory 0.6.3+patch.1.

cells.cell: ironclaw / off / local-docker — 3 of 3 at 100% pass (r1/r2/r3)
cells.notes: 3 runs × 35/35 substrate scenarios. overall_pass=true on every run. Workstation 8 GB/ironclaw container Docker mesh; Postgres 15 + pgvector per agent for ironclaw's own memory; ai-memory remains substrate-under-test. ironclaw 0.27.0 (NEAR AI Rust).

cells.cell: hermes / off / local-docker — 3 of 3 at 100% pass (r1/r2/r3)

Hermes Agent v0.12.0 (2026.4.30) + pinned python-dotenv 1.0.1 + httpx 0.27.2. HERMES_FORCE_LLM=0 default — substrate scenarios run via HTTP-direct fallback (matches OpenClaw + IronClaw pattern; LLM-MCP path independently certified by F2b probe + Phase 3 NHI).
